g.text: 802 Bankview Dr, Drumheller, Alberta | File VAL251026
24 19 Street NE, a 12-unit multifamily property located in the Northeast
Crescent Heights neighborhood of Medicine Hat, Alberta, sold on July 22,
2025, for $1,300,000 ($108,333 per unit). The asset was purchased by
22445038 Alberta Ltd. from 2114911 Alberta Ltd. in an arm’s-length, cash-to-
seller transaction. Constructed in 1975, the two-and-a-half-storey, wood-
frame building comprises one one-bedroom unit and eleven two-bedroom
units, each featuring private balconies. The property includes paved on-site
parking and landscaped grounds. At the time of sale, the property generated
a reported net operating income of $78,491, reﬂecting a capitalization rate of
